descriptions.business: Takes 2 minutes. We’ll verify your WhatsApp number first.
descriptions.otp: Enter the code we sent to your WhatsApp.
descriptions.payout: Add your bank account to receive payouts. You can skip this for now.
descriptions.complete: Your account is ready. Start adding products to sell.
descriptions.trustNote: Your information is stored securely and used only for account setup and order payouts.

whatsapp.label: WhatsApp phone number
whatsapp.helper: This is where we'll send your verification code.
whatsapp.errorInvalid: Enter a valid Nigerian number, e.g. +2348012345678.

otp.label: Verification code
otp.instruction: . Enter it below to verify your number.

payout.whyNeedThisBody1: Your bank details are used to settle payouts from completed orders. You can skip this now, but we
payout.whyNeedThisBold: won’t be able to release funds
payout.accountErrorVerify: Wait for account verification to complete.

actions.updateLater: You can always add or update your payout details later from Settings.

storefront.whatsappManifest: Hello Holdway, I want to checkout order ID: {order_id}
storefront.escrowBody: Your payment is held safely in escrow and only released to the merchant after you confirm delivery.
storefront.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
storefront.subtitle: Secure checkout via WhatsApp
storefront.escrowProtectedHeader: Escrow-protected – your money is held safely until delivery
storefront.shippingDetailInfo: Flat-rate delivery — we'll confirm the cost on WhatsApp.
storefront.escrowBodyNoRisk: Your payment is held safely until you confirm delivery. No risk.

payoutBanner.message: Payouts are paused — add your bank details to receive money.
